caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.caption: Wombats poop cubes
shots.visual: real wombat in grass, cute not childish, instant hook

shots.voiceover: Not perfect toy blocks, but little cube-shaped pellets.
shots.caption: little cube shaped pellets
shots.visual: macro-safe tiny cube scat proxy beside natural ground

shots.voiceover: Scientists think the shape comes from uneven stretching inside the intestine.
shots.caption: uneven stretching / inside the intestine
shots.visual: non-text anatomical motion proxy, no diagram labels

shots.voiceover: The corners form before the poop ever lands.
shots.caption: the corners form first

shots.voiceover: So the weirdest bathroom fact in nature is also physics.
shots.caption: bathroom fact / plus physics
shots.visual: wombat walking away, family-friendly final beat
